scope: PostgreSQL and DuckDB migration infrastructure in opencode-desktop-dev monorepo

packages.name: opencode
packages.role: main application package with storage layer

packages.name: @opencode-ai/effect-drizzle-sqlite
packages.role: Effect + Drizzle SQLite bridge (no PG counterpart exists)

files.description: Original SQLite-first database client. Uses #db alias. Has getPath(), use(), transaction(), etc.
PostgreSQL database init. Supports PGlite (embedded) and node-postgres (remote). Exports init(), initFromPool(), applyMigrations(), PgPool.
DuckDB Effect service. CLI spawn-based + WASM client support. Connection pool, HealthRegistry integration.
Dual-adapter: DatabaseAdapter Service with makeSQLiteAdapter() and makePgAdapter(). Switchable via _tag: "sqlite" | "postgres".
PgPool class with retry logic, Effect.schedule, sanitized URL logging.
Effect Config for DuckDB settings (path, file retention).
SQL firewall: blocked functions, injection detection for DuckDB.
Shared TimestampsPg helper used by all pgTable definitions.
DuckDB DDL: views (SESSION_CLUSTERING, TOOL_USAGE), tables (WAVES, FINDINGS, REGISTRY, QA, DIAGNOSTICS, CTX_FILE_EVENTS, CTX_FILE_RELEVANCE), init functions.
Unified migration runner. Supports sqlite and pg dialects. Auto-detection via OPENCODE_DATABASE_DIALECT and OPENCODE_DATABASE_URL. CLI entry point with --pg / --sqlite flags.

schema_files.coverage: 8/8 SQLite schemas have mirror PG schemas. coordination.pg.sql.ts is PG-only (no SQLite equivalent). schema.pg.sql.ts is a shared helper.
key_differences_sqlite_vs_pg: sqlite: imports from drizzle-orm/sqlite-core -> pg: imports from drizzle-orm/pg-core
sqlite: uses sqliteTable() -> pg: uses pgTable()
sqlite: json stored as text({mode:'json'}) -> pg: uses jsonb()
sqlite: booleans via integer({mode:'boolean'}) -> pg: uses boolean()
PG adds foreign key REFERENCES clauses not present in SQLite schemas
PG adds indices that SQLite schemas may lack

drizzle_configs.sqlite_config: No drizzle.config.sqlite.ts found. SQLite migrations were likely generated via drizzle-kit with default/inline config.

migration_scripts.purpose: Generate PG migrations from pg schema files
Run all storage tests incl PG

import_aliases.#db-duckdb: packages/opencode/src/storage/db.duckdb.ts (one mapping for bun, node, and default)

dependencies.@effect/sql-pg: not in dependencies (peer dep in drizzle-orm but not listed)

effect_drizzle_sqlite_package.pg_counterpart: Does NOT exist. No packages/effect-drizzle-pg exists. The adapter.ts provides its own makePgAdapter implementation that bridges Drizzle PG client to Effect's DatabaseAdapter.Service.

pg_tests.description: Tests runMigrations() with both SQLite and PG dialects, auto-detection, env var overrides, CLI flags, error handling
test_names: runs SQLite migrations on :memory: with explicit dialect
runs PG migrations on in-memory PGlite
auto-detects PG when OPENCODE_DATABASE_URL is set
throws when PG mode has no connection string
detects sqlite from OPENCODE_DATABASE_DIALECT env var
defaults to sqlite when no env vars are set
detects invalid dialect env var and falls through

pg_tests.description: PG-specific integration tests: CRUD via DatabaseAdapter with PG layer
Comprehensive adapter tests: transaction isolation, error sanitization, connection strings scrubbed from errors, PGlite vs real PG
PgPool tests: retry logic, connection failure handling
Test fixture: makePGLayer() uses PGlite (in-memory), makeRealPgLayer() uses node-postgres with connection string

test_discoveries: migration.pg.test.ts referenced in CI script but NOT found on disk - may have been renamed to migrate.test.ts
pg-integration.pg.test.ts and pg-pool.pg.test.ts are NOT run in CI (only migration + adapter)
adapter.pg.test.ts:476 lines is the most substantial PG test

claim_atoms: InstanceLayer.layer no longer uses Layer.unwrap - uses static import
TypeScript build passes with database adapter layer composition after static import change
env.d.ts JsonMigration namespace removed, applyMigrations declaration added
Sidecar no longer destructures JsonMigration, imports node-sqlite driver, or has needsMigration block
applyMigrations() is called from sidecar startup after Log.init()
preload types renamed from SqliteMigrationProgress to MigrationProgress, IPC channel renamed
loading.tsx import and API usage updated to renamed types/channels
phases: C: Repair Sidecar Boot (remove SQLite imports, add applyMigrations)
D1-D6: Clean up preload, IPC, main index, server, renderer naming

review_documents.note: Schema selection coupled to runtime config is incompatible with module-load-time imports
All 6 files in scope, uses #db import pattern consistent with codebase, concurrent migration race concern identified

ci_configuration.notes: CI only runs test:pg:ci (migration.pg.test.ts + adapter.pg.test.ts). Does NOT run test:pg:all. Linux only (no Windows).

key_commits.message: Phase 0: native tool framework upgrade + gap tools + 135 typecheck fixes
feat(tools): convert 27 plugin tools to built-in Effect tools with DuckDB backend
feat(storage): DuckDB data pipeline with persistent analytics store
test: add Phase D DuckDB query + firewall tests
refactor(v2): use effect sqlite session storage
fix(migration): unblock workspace.time_used add on populated tables

duckdb_assessment.status: fully operational, no migration framework needed
duckdb_assessment.reason: DuckDB uses raw SQL DDL (schema.duckdb.ts), not Drizzle ORM. Tables/views are created imperatively via initTablesSql()/initViewsSql(). No migration files, no drizzle integration.
components: db.duckdb.ts - Effect Service with connection pool (CLI spawn + WASM)
schema.duckdb.ts - DDL for 7+ tables and 2+ views
duckdb-query.ts - Tool for agent DuckDB queries

blocking_issues.description: InstanceLayer.layer uses Layer.unwrap(Effect.promise(...)) which creates an opaque node in Effect's layer graph, hiding DatabaseAdapter dependency from compile-time resolver. This causes DatabaseAdapter.Service to be unresolved when createRoutes() composes the route graph.
Desktop sidecar (sidecar.ts) still imports drizzle-orm/node-sqlite, destructures JsonMigration, has needsMigration block referencing SQLite. These need to be updated for PG-only runtime.
SqliteMigrationProgress type, 'sqlite_waiting' phase string, 'onSqliteMigrationProgress' IPC callback, 'sendSqliteMigrationProgress' function all reference SQLite. These need generic renaming for PG.

non_blocking_gaps.description: migration-pg/meta/_journal.json does not exist. drizzle-kit should generate this for tracking applied migrations.
CI script references 'test/storage/migration.pg.test.ts' but file may not exist on disk. Current file is 'migrate.test.ts' (without .pg. suffix).
No packages/effect-drizzle-pg exists. The PG adapter in adapter.ts uses its own makePgAdapter implementation. This is intentional per the plan.
non_blocking_gaps.decision: intentional - DrizzleLikeClient wrapper is the boundary

non_blocking_gaps.description: @effect/sql-pg is NOT in dependencies (it's an optional peer dep of drizzle-orm@1.0.0-rc.2). The codebase uses @electric-sql/pglite and pg packages directly instead.
non_blocking_gaps.decision: intentional - PGlite + node-postgres + drizzle-orm drivers are the chosen stack

non_blocking_gaps.description: CI pg job only runs selected PG tests. Does NOT run pg-integration.pg.test.ts or pg-pool.pg.test.ts. Linux-only.

duckdb.status: Fully operational. No migration framework needed. Uses raw SQL DDL.
